Name: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
Ingredients: 2 slices whole grain bread|1 ripe avocado|2 eggs|1 tbsp white vinegar|Salt and pepper|Red pepper flakes|1 tbsp sesame seeds|Fresh herbs
Notes: Use sourdough for extra flavor. Poach eggs in simmering water with a splash of vinegar for best shape.

Name: Fluffy Scrambled Eggs with Chives
Ingredients: 3 large eggs|1 tbsp butter|2 tbsp whole milk|2 tbsp fresh chives|Salt and white pepper
Notes: Perfect scrambled eggs are low and slow. Remove from heat while still slightly wet — carryover cooking finishes them.

Name: Overnight Oats with Berries
Ingredients: 1/2 cup rolled oats|1/2 cup Greek yogurt|1/2 cup almond milk|1 tbsp chia seeds|1 tbsp honey|1/2 cup mixed berries|1/4 tsp vanilla
Notes: Make the night before. Add more milk in the morning if too thick.

Name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
Ingredients: 1 cup Greek yogurt|1/2 cup granola|1/2 cup mixed berries|1 tbsp honey|1 tbsp sliced almonds
Notes: Layer in a glass for presentation. Works best with thick Greek-style yogurt.

Name: Banana Oat Pancakes
Ingredients: 2 ripe bananas|2 eggs|1 cup rolled oats|1/4 cup almond milk|1 tsp baking powder|1/2 tsp cinnamon|1 tbsp maple syrup|Butter for cooking
Notes: Blend oats first for smoother batter. Flip when bubbles appear on surface.

Name: Acai Smoothie Bowl
Ingredients: 2 frozen acai packets|1 frozen banana|1/2 cup frozen berries|1/4 cup almond milk|1/4 cup granola|1/2 banana sliced|1 tbsp coconut flakes|1 tbsp chia seeds
Notes: Blend should be THICKER than a smoothie. Pour into a wide chilled bowl.

Name: Spinach and Feta Omelette
Ingredients: 3 large eggs|1 cup spinach|1/4 cup feta cheese|2 tbsp water|1 tbsp olive oil|2 cherry tomatoes|Fresh dill
Notes: Fold in half when top is still slightly wet — residual heat finishes cooking.

Name: Blueberry Lemon Muffins
Ingredients: 2 cups flour|3/4 cup sugar|1/2 tsp salt|2 tsp baking powder|1/3 cup oil|1 egg|2/3 cup milk|1 tsp vanilla|Zest of 1 lemon|1 cup blueberries
Notes: Mix wet and dry separately
column12: then fold together. Gently fold in berries — don't overmix.

Name: Grilled Chicken Caesar Salad
Ingredients: 1 chicken breast|4 cups romaine|2 tbsp Caesar dressing|2 tbsp parmesan|1/2 cup croutons|Garlic powder|Salt and pepper|Lemon wedge
Notes: Let chicken rest 5 min before slicing — juices redistribute for moister meat.

Name: Turkey Avocado Wrap
Ingredients: 1 large tortilla|4 oz turkey breast|1/2 avocado|2 leaves romaine|2 slices tomato|1 tbsp hummus|1 tbsp cream cheese|Salt and pepper
Notes: Roll tightly away from you for a clean wrap. Cut diagonally to show layers.

Name: Buddha Bowl
Ingredients: 1 cup quinoa|1 cup chickpeas|1 cup roasted sweet potato|2 cups mixed greens|1/4 cup tahini|2 tbsp lemon juice|1 tbsp olive oil|Garlic clove
Notes: Roast sweet potato at 400F for 20 min. Whisk tahini

Name: Chicken Shawarma Bowl
Ingredients: 1 chicken thigh|1 tsp cumin|1 tsp paprika|1/2 tsp turmeric|1 cup hummus|1 cup rice|1/2 cucumber|1/4 cup tahini|Lemon
Notes: Marinate chicken in spices + yogurt for 2 hrs or overnight for best flavor.

Name: Beef Tacos
Ingredients: 1 lb ground beef|1 tbsp cumin|1 tbsp chili powder|8 corn tortillas|1 cup shredded lettuce|1/2 cup salsa|1/2 cup cheese|1 avocado
Notes: Toast tortillas in dry skillet for 30 sec per side for structural integrity.

Name: Chicken Fajitas
Ingredients: 2 chicken breasts|1 bell pepper|1 onion|2 tbsp fajita seasoning|8 flour tortillas|Lime|1/2 cup sour cream|Salt
Notes: Sear chicken on high heat
column13: then slice thin against the grain.

Name: Pad Thai
Ingredients: 8 oz rice noodles|2 eggs|1 cup bean sprouts|3 green onions|1/2 cup peanuts|2 tbsp fish sauce|1 tbsp tamarind paste|2 tbsp brown sugar|Lime
Notes: Keep wok smoking hot. Cook eggs first

Name: Fried Rice
Ingredients: 3 cups day-old rice|2 eggs|1 cup frozen peas and carrots|3 green onions|2 tbsp soy sauce|1 tbsp sesame oil|1/2 cup corn|Garlic
Notes: Use cold day-old rice — fresh rice gets mushy. High heat

Name: Cheeseburger
Ingredients: 1 beef patty|1 brioche bun|2 slices cheddar|1 lettuce leaf|2 tomato slices|1 tbsp ketchup|1 tbsp mustard|1 tbsp mayo
Notes: Press patty thin — it shrinks. Only flip once.

Name: Tofu Stir Fry
Ingredients: 14 oz firm tofu|2 cups broccoli|1 cup bell pepper|2 tbsp soy sauce|1 tbsp sesame oil|1 tbsp cornstarch|3 garlic cloves|1 inch ginger
Notes: Press tofu 30 min before cooking for better browning. High heat

Name: Caprese Sandwich
Ingredients: 1 baguette|4 oz mozzarella|2 large tomatoes|1/4 cup basil|2 tbsp balsamic glaze|1 tbsp olive oil|Salt and pepper
Notes: Layer cheese and tomato

Name: Shakshuka
Ingredients: 4 eggs|1 can diced tomatoes|1 onion|2 garlic cloves|1 tsp cumin|1 tsp paprika|1/4 cup feta|2 tbsp olive oil|Fresh parsley
Notes: Make sauce first
column12: then nest eggs in. Cover and simmer until whites are set.

Name: Salmon with Asparagus
Ingredients: 2 salmon fillets|1 bunch asparagus|2 tbsp olive oil|2 garlic cloves|1 lemon|1 tsp dill|2 tbsp butter|Salt and pepper
Notes: Roast salmon at 400F for 12-15 min. Don't overcook — it continues cooking while resting.

Name: Butter Chicken
Ingredients: 1.5 lbs chicken thighs|1 cup yogurt|2 tbsp garam masala|1 can tomato sauce|1 cup heavy cream|3 garlic cloves|2 inch ginger|2 tbsp butter|1 tbsp cornstarch
Notes: Marinate chicken overnight in yogurt + spices. Brown chicken first

Name: Spaghetti Bolognese
Ingredients: 1 lb ground beef|1 onion|3 garlic cloves|1 can crushed tomatoes|1 cup red wine|8 oz spaghetti|1 carrot|1 celery stalk|1/4 cup parmesan
Notes: Add wine to deglaze pan. Simmer sauce 30 min minimum for deep flavor.

Name: Chicken Fried Rice
Ingredients: 3 cups day-old rice|2 chicken breasts|3 eggs|1 cup frozen peas|3 green onions|2 tbsp soy sauce|1 tbsp sesame oil|1 cup corn
Notes: Cold rice is essential. Stir-fry chicken first

Name: Beef Burrito Bowl
Ingredients: 1 cup rice|1 lb ground beef|1 can black beans|1 cup corn|1 cup salsa|1/2 cup cheese|1 avocado|1 lime|2 tbsp cilantro
Notes: Season beef with cumin
column13: garlic. Layer everything in bowl for visual appeal.

Name: Miso Glazed Salmon
Ingredients: 2 salmon fillets|2 tbsp white miso|1 tbsp mirin|1 tbsp sake|1 tsp sugar|2 green onions|1 tsp sesame seeds
Notes: Marinate 30 min in miso mixture. Broil on high 5-7 min until caramelized.

Name: Greek Salad
Ingredients: 2 cups cucumber|1 cup cherry tomatoes|1/2 red onion|1/2 cup feta|1/4 cup kalamata olives|2 tbsp olive oil|1 tsp oregano|Salt and pepper
Notes: Cut vegetables large and chunky. Feta goes on top whole
